hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; repo=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner --jq '.nameWithOwner' 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; if gh api "repos/$repo/branches?protected=true&per_page=100" --jq '.[].name' 2>/dev/null | grep -qx "$branch"; then echo "BLOCK: '$branch' is a protected branch in $repo — push from a feature branch instead." >&2; exit 1; fi

python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
payload = json.load(sys.stdin)
content = payload.get('content', '') or payload.get('new_string', '')
patterns = [
    r'unofficial_academic_record',
    r'mfe-applications',
    r'Akhil Karra Resume',
    r'summer-2026-plan\.md',
    r'MSCF Class of',
]
for p in patterns:
    if re.search(p, content, re.IGNORECASE):
        print(f'BLOCK: private content pattern: {p}', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
"
